channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: COMPUTEX 2026: Corsair Announces Lineup Of New Products
item.content:encoded:
COMPUTEX 2026 is taking place in Taiwan this week, and companies from around the world are announcing their lineups of new consumer products heading to market. One company that’s expanding its peripheral offerings for players is Corsair, announcing four new products at the event.

First, two new gaming headsets were revealed: The Corsair HS35 v3 and v3 wireless.

These headsets are entry-level devices, featuring custom-tuned 50mm neodymium drivers. The wired version, retailing for $49.99, features a 3.5mm jack that can connect to PC, consoles, and mobile devices. If you want the wireless version at $79.99, it can connect via 2.4Ghz adapter or Bluetooth.

“A redesigned adjustable floating headband and breathable soft fabric earcups keep the headset comfortable through long play sessions,” Corsair says.

The wireless headset comes in at 250g and features a detachable omnidirectional mic and up to 30 hours of battery life. For the wired, the microphone isn’t detachable, but the headset is slightly lighter at 230g.

Aside from headsets, a new keyboard and mouse were announced.

The Corsair Clipper Pro Mini 60 Hall Effect Gaming Keyboard—that’s a mouthful, for sure—adds hall effect into a 60% layout. Retailing for $99.99, it allows up to four different actions to a single key, tap lock that turns hold actions into toggles, and a smart tap feature that lets users assign separate actions to quick taps.

Also included are new MGX Hyperdrive Core magnetic switches.

“As the first CORSAIR keyboard with these new switches, players will enjoy adjustable actuation from 0.2mm to 3.8mm with consistent performance across 100 million keystrokes,” Corsair says. “A square stem structure reduces wobble for crisper switch feel and more precise actuation.”

Lastly, the Nightsword v2 Wireless Stream Deck mouse is the first mouse to feature a dedicated Stream Deck launch button.

“One press of the Stream Deck Launch Button summons an Elgato Virtual Stream Deck overlay directly on-screen, built around whatever game or genre you are playing,” Corsair said. “Set up profiles for easy ability chains, inventory shortcuts, media controls, and more. Virtual Stream Decks can be triggered from 8 programmable buttons on the NIGHTSWORD v2 WIRELESS SD, and you can natively map functions to the mouse with the Stream Deck app.”

Every product is available starting today, June 2, and can be purchased from Corsair or a partner retailer.

What do you think of the products Corsair unveiled? Do any stand out to you? Leave your thoughts in the comments below, or join the discussion in the official Insider Gaming Discord.

In other news, check out the new ASUS ROG XBOX Ally X20 that features an OLED display. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/computex-2026-corsair-lineup-new-products/

item.title: New Pokémon Champions Free VP Mystery Gift Released
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon Champions players can redeem a new free gift in celebration of the upcoming 2026 North America International Championships.

The VGC tournament will take place between June 12 and June 14.

The free gift will give players 500 Victory Points (VP), the same amount that is given for completing daily challenges.

Meanwhile, it costs 2,500 VP to permanently recruit a Pokémon unless the player has Teammate Tickets.

The free VP is available for Pokémon Champions players until June 14, 23:59 UTC (19:59 EDT).

How to Claim Free VP Gift in Pokémon Champions

To claim the free NAIC VP gift, follow these instructions:

  • From the Pokémon Champions home menu, select the ‘Submenu’ in the bottom right corner.
  • Scroll down to find the ‘Mystery Gifts’ option and select it.
  • Hover the cursor over the bar and select it, then enter the code: “CHAMP10NSATNA1C” and hit confirm.
  • Return to the home menu, then select the Mailbox option.
  • Once in the Mailbox, you will see the Mystery Gift waiting for you. Press X to claim all and receive the VP.

Pokémon Champions Mystery Gifts

There are various other mystery gifts that Pokémon Champions players claim for free goodies.

Machamp

There is also another code that will earn you a free Machamp through the in-game Mystery Gift option.

Under mystery gift, enter the code “CHAMP10N” before August 31 to receive the fighting type.

Mega Stones

Pokémon Champions players can also get free Mega Evolution stones if they own Pokémon Legends Z-A on their Nintendo Switch.

Using Pokémon HOME to send over a Chestnaught, Delphox, Greninja, and Eternal Flower Floette originally caught in Legends Z-A will earn players the Mega Stones for all four Pokémon for free.

This is the only way to get Mega Floette, which was part of Pokémon Champions’ first VGC regional-winning team.

Dragonite

Additionally, anyone who downloads and plays Pokémon Champions before August 31 will automatically receive a free Dragonite.

In your mailbox, players will find the dragon-type Pokémon and 100 Quick Coupons to speed up the refresh on their Recruit timer.

What team have you been using in Pokémon Champions? Share your line-ups with us on the Insider Gaming Discord.

Additionally, a Pokémon Champions producer has teased legendary Pokémon and future updates to the game.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Amazon Adding 15 Games For Prime Members To Claim In June
item.content:encoded:
Amazon Prime is giving its members over a dozen games to claim and keep in June, including some highly regarded titles.

The company announced its latest collection of games available on Amazon Luna Cloud Gaming, formerly known as Prime Gaming. This month includes 15 games, including three available starting today, June 2.

Games available to claim include Tomb Raider IV-VI Remastered, Mafia III: Definitive Edition,

To claim the games, visit the Amazon Luna site and log in. After you claim the games, you’ll be given a code for various storefronts. All you have to do is redeem them in the proper store, and the games are yours to keep forever.

It’s also important to note that the games are for PC only.

Check out the full list of games below, and be sure to let us know what games stand out to you this month down in the comments and over in the official Insider Gaming Discord.

Amazon Prime’s Free Games – June 2026

Available Now

  • Tomb Raider IV-VI Remastered – Epic Games Store
  • Mafia III: Definitive Edition – GOG
  • XCOM: Chimera Squad – GOG

June 11

  • Tested on Humans: Escape Room – GOG
  • Sin Slayers: Reign of the 8th – GOG
  • G.I. Joe: Wrath of Cobra – Epic Games Store
  • Paradise Killer – GOG

June 18

  • Between Time: Escape Room – GOG
  • Sugardew Island – GOG
  • Wargame Construction Set III: Age of Rifles 1846-1905 – GOG
  • Space Grunts 2 – GOG

June 25

  • Space Grunts: Chrono Shard – Epic Games Store
  • Please Touch the Artwork – Legacy Games
  • Terraforming Mars – Amazon Games App
  • Lost Eidolons: Veil of the Witch – Amazon Games App

What Is Amazon Luna?

Amazon Luna is the company’s cloud gaming service. It allows you to play several games right in your browser with no downloads. While plenty of games are available as part of an Amazon Prime subscription, there is a Luna Premium subscription for $10 per month that gives players a larger library of games.

The free games are a rotating catalog of games for subscribers. Unlike services like Xbox Game Pass and PlayStation Plus, once you claim a game to download, it’s yours to keep even if you cancel your Prime membership.

In other news, check out everything that was announced as part of the inaugural Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, including 15 world premieres. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

item.title: College Football 27 Covers Revealed Ahead Of Presentation
item.content:encoded:
The buildup for EA Sports College Football 27 is underway, and it begins with the reveal of the game’s official covers.

Announced on Tuesday, it was confirmed that Oregon quarterback Dante Moore, Miami wide receiver Malachi Toney, and Ole Miss running back Kewan Lacey will grace the cover of the Standard Edition of College Football 27.

The cover of the Deluxe Edition also includes Indiana coach Curt Cignetti, Texas linebacker Colin Simmons, Notre Dame cornerback Leonard Moore, and USC quarterback Jayden Maiava.

“College Football 27 promises to be an incredible year, one in which we’re able to start reflecting the modern era of college football more authentically and with more depth for our players than ever before,” Evan Dexter, VP of Franchise Strategy and Marketing at EA Sports, said.

“Our cover athletes – Kewan Lacy, Malachi Toney, and Dante Moore – represent that modern era by transcending programs and drawing in generations of college football fans, regardless of their school pride.”

The reveal of the covers is just the start for College Football 27. EA Sports is set to reveal full features of the game, along with details on Madden 27, on Thursday, June 4. Airing at 8pm ET, EA Sports Opening Drive is a new approach to how the developers want to unveil things to players.

Some of the features coming to College Football 27 include a Mascot Mashup mode, new positions in Road to Glory, enhanced Dynasty Mode improvements, and more. There’s also a strong rumor suggesting that the game will make it’s debut on PC this year.

Everything will be announced on Thursday, and Insider Gaming will have full coverage of the reveal.

Are you looking forward to playing College Football 27? Leave your thoughts in the comments below, or join the discussion in the official Insider Gaming Discord.

In other news, check out everything that was announced as part of the inaugural Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, including 15 world premieres. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1810: Hints and Answer for June 3, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Wordle challenges players to guess a fresh five-letter word each day in six tries or fewer. Whether you’re a beginner or a daily player, today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1810 for June 3, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, June 3, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1810 is a somewhat challenging puzzle. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 4.5 out of 6 guesses, which is slightly less than the 5-guess average of yesterday’s puzzle.

General Wordle Hints For June 3

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: It refers to a small cut, indentation, or groove in an object.
  • Hint 2: The word can also represent a level or step in a ranking system.
  • Hint 3: You might hear it in the phrase “take it up a ___”.
  • Hint 4: It can be found on tools, belts, wood, or other physical items where markings are useful

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1810 for June 3, 2026.

Starter Words For June 3, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • THORN
  • COUNT
  • NORTH
  • TONIC

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1810 On June 3, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: NOTCH

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

NOTCH is a noun that means “an angular or V -shaped cut, indentation, or slit in an object, surface, or edge.” It can also mean “a step, degree, or grade.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1809 on June 2, 2026

Answer: BASIS

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1810

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads-up. The game on June 4 will be Wordle Game #1811.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hell Let Loose Vietnam Delayed By Team17
item.content:encoded:
A new announcement from Team17 reveals that Hell Let Loose Vietnam has been delayed, with a new release date of August 13, 2026.

The developers recently held a free-to-play PC Steam open beta for Hell Let Loose Vietnam, during which many players experienced the game for the first time. There was a lot of feedback during this phase, and, along with internal testing, the developers decided that the best course of action was to delay the game for a better launch experience.

Hell Let Loose Vietnam’s New Release Date Set for August 13

Through a statement provided to Insider Gaming, Team17 has confirmed that Hell Let Loose Vietnam has been delayed to August 13. The developers stated that, along with the feedback received during the open and closed betas, Team17 conducted intensive internal playtests of the PC and console versions of the game, which led to the discovery of “several areas” that will require additional development time.

The developers have decided to delay the game’s release by approximately two months to “deliver a stronger launch experience.” They have apologized for the delay and promised to keep players updated on the development progress. The team is committed to achieving a level of quality that meets both its own expectations and those of the players. The original release date for Hell Let Loose Vietnam was scheduled for June 18, 2026, which was just over two weeks away.

In other news, Insider Gaming had the chance to get a hands-on experience of Hell Let Loose: Vietnam, and here’s how it went. What are your thoughts on Hell Let Loose Vietnam being delayed? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Marathon’s new experimental PvP-lite mode, Sponsored Survival. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
